content.en:
"There is no Death Void in the Upper Domain?"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised.

At this moment, he was standing in the void outside the Upper Domain's extradimensional realm, and what he felt was not the power of death, but a special dimensional energy that was so dense that it was extremely rich, and he could absorb this dimensional energy and improve his own cultivation.

Moreover, this energy is very gentle and does not let the weak die.

In terms of environment alone, the 4000th Territory is far inferior to the Upper Domain.

"No wonder so many powerhouses are born in the Upper Domain, the cultivation environment here is too good!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

As far as he could see, there were countless points of light in this void, each of which represented an extradimensional realm.

He immediately shuttled towards the nearest point of light, and soon he came to the extradimensional realm where this point of light was located.

"What a big extradimensional realm!"

This extradimensional realm is more than ten times larger than the extradimensional realm on the other side of the 4000th Territory.

And there are portals in the extra-dimensional realms here, which must be entered through the portal, otherwise even the sixth realm will not be able to shuttle through, and the walls of the extra-dimensional realm are engraved with a special enchantment to prevent the extra-dimensional realm from forcibly entering the extra-dimensional realm.

Ye Tian honestly entered this extradimensional realm from one of the portals, but there was no toll, he just needed to register the information, and the information he filled in was a casual cultivation.

After entering this extra-dimensional realm, Ye Tian found that the cultivation environment inside this extra-dimensional realm was also very good, and the extremely rich energy came to his face, and it was easier to absorb.

In such an environment, it is too easy to become an extradimensional realm.

Along the way, he sensed a lot of living beings, most of them had powerful bloodlines, as if they were born extradimensional creatures, but they followed the path of cultivators, and they were all superdimensional realms of the first realm.

Here, the transcendent realm of the first realm is like an ordinary cultivator, it is really too frequent, perhaps seventy percent of the living beings who are killed with one palm are the transcendent realm of the first realm.

There are also creatures below the first extradimensional realm, but there are very few of them, and most of them are children.

From the perspective of life level, the creatures in the upper region far surpassed the creatures in the lower region from the beginning.

"No wonder the Upper Domain doesn't look down on the Upper and Lower Domains, and the Lower Domain calls those thousands of extradimensional domains, it's really too big a gap!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to a giant city.

This giant city is made entirely of a special material, and I am afraid that even the fifth realm cannot leave a trace on it, and this is just an ordinary giant city in this extradimensional realm.

Other than that.

After entering, I found that there was a formation here that was enough to restrain the fifth realm and even the sixth realm, preventing the sixth realm from causing too much damage here.

I'm afraid that the Sixth Realm can't even destroy a street here, and its strength has been suppressed to a very low level.

It's very unpleasant for the Sixth Realm, but it's much safer for the weak.

Otherwise, once the sixth realm gets angry and the breath explodes, you can kill a group of fourth realms in seconds, in this case, where is there any safety to talk about.

With this kind of formation, the weak extradimensional realm would not worry about dying from the aftermath of the breath of the strong.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to some shops and exchanged some of his resources for a currency in the upper domain - Duowei Tongbao!

Duowei Tongbao is a kind of high-grade currency suitable for circulation above the fifth realm, the value is very high, and it is very tough, the fifth realm is not easy to destroy it, its material is a very special metal, can refine extremely powerful weapons, so it is refined into currency.

Compared with many Fifth Realms in the Upper Domain, Ye Tian was not rich, and many of his material resources could not be exchanged for a multi-dimensional treasure, so he had no choice but to take out a piece of multi-dimensional rule things, which was exchanged for a lot of multi-dimensional treasures.

After that, he rented a mansion, which was very safe enough to withstand the attacks of the Sixth Realm, and contained a cultivation space inside, which contained a thousand times the energy of the outside world, suitable for cultivation.

But.

Ye Tian only rented one extra-dimensional epoch time, but he also spent ten multi-dimensional treasures.

After settling down, Ye Tian began to inquire about the news, to understand the intelligence of the upper domain, and to understand the intelligence of this extradimensional territory.

Soon, Ye Tian knew something about this place.

The extradimensional realm where he is located is called Tianshu No. 1008 Realm, and the reason why it is so named is because this extradimensional realm is under the control of a force, and that force is called Tianshu Sect.

And there are more than 60,000 extra-dimensional realms under the command of Tianshu Sect, in order to make it easier to name and let people know that this is the extra-dimensional realm of Tianshu Sect, it is named after Tianshu, and the number is added to it, and it becomes the name of the extradimensional realm.

As for this extra-dimensional realm, it is 3,721 territories, with a total of 630,000 extra-dimensional realms, and the Tianshu Sect only occupies more than 60,000, and there are more than a dozen other huge forces competing with the Tianshu Sect.

The strength of the Tianshu Sect is also extremely strong, with a total of seven seventh realms, more than 20,000 sixth realms, and even more as for the fifth realm.

"From this point of view, the strength of the Tianshu Sect is even stronger than that of the Shangqing Feather Palace!"

He didn't leave this place for a short time, so he settled down, and by the way, he found out how to hide the secret art of being tracked by others.

I thought that such a secret technique was very rare, but I didn't expect it to be very common.

A secret technique like the Great Realm Armor Technique is not precious here, but almost all of this secret art has a cultivation limit.

For example, the Great Realm Armor Technique requires the Celestial Armor talent, and other secret techniques are also similar restrictions.

Soon.

Ye Tian took a fancy to an amazing secret technique, and the grade was much higher than that of the Great Realm Armor Technique.

【Thirty-six Star Secret Techniques】

If this secret technique is cultivated to the eighteenth level, it can make it impossible for any sixth realm to deduce traces, and if it is cultivated to the twenty-seventh level, it can make it impossible for any seventh realm to deduce its traces.

If you had cultivated to the highest level of the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique, then even the Eighth Realm would not be able to deduce its traces.

As for the secret technique that could make it impossible to deduce from the Ninth Realm, he had never encountered it, and even if he did, it would be impossible to trade it.

And the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique is undoubtedly the most promising secret technique he has at present.

After many inquiries, Ye Tian finally contacted a superdimensional realm in the early stage of the sixth realm and made an appointment with him to trade in Beisha City.

The other party happened to have the Thirty-six Star Secret Technique Inheritance in his hand, and the price was not expensive, and he only needed to pay 3,000 multi-dimensional Tongbao to trade.

Soon.

Ye Tian saw this Extradimensional Realm Third at the beginning of the Sixth Realm.
